text:
Giving a bath does not ordinarily require the skills of a nurse and, therefore, would not be 
covered as a skilled nursing service unless the patient's condition is such that the bath 
could be given safely and effectively only by a nurse (as discussed in §30.1 above). 

EXAMPLE 4: 

A patient with a well-established colostomy absent complications may require assistance 
changing the colostomy bag because they cannot do it themselves and there is no one else 
to change the bag. Notwithstanding
